SEARCH
Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.punishment

Class PunishmentTypeRegistry

java.lang.Object
de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.punishment.PunishmentTypeRegistry
public final class PunishmentTypeRegistry extends Object
A central registry for PunishmentTypes. This class is used to register and retrieve punishment types by their integer IDs.
Since:
1.2.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @NotNull Punishment
    createPunishment(int id, @NotNull Map<String,Object> data)
    Creates a new punishment of the given type with the given data.
    static @NotNull Punishment
    createPunishment(@NotNull PunishmentType type, @NotNull Map<String,Object> data)
    Creates a new punishment of the given type with the given data.
    static PunishmentType
    getType(int id)
    Retrieves a PunishmentType by its ID.
    static void
    registerType(PunishmentType type, PunishmentFactory factory)
    Registers a new PunishmentType with the given ID and factory to create punishments of this type.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • registerType

      public static void registerType(PunishmentType type, PunishmentFactory factory)
      Registers a new PunishmentType with the given ID and factory to create punishments of this type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type to register
      factory - the factory to create punishments of this type

    • getType

      public static PunishmentType getType(int id)
      Retrieves a PunishmentType by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the type
      Returns:
      the type or null if not found

    • createPunishment

      @NotNull public static @NotNull Punishment createPunishment(@NotNull @NotNull PunishmentType type, @NotNull @NotNull Map<String,Object> data)
      Creates a new punishment of the given type with the given data.
      Parameters:
      type - the type of the punishment
      data - the data to create the punishment with
      Returns:
      the created punishment
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no factory is registered for the given type
      IllegalArgumentException - if the data is invalid or incomplete

    • createPunishment

      @NotNull public static @NotNull Punishment createPunishment(int id, @NotNull @NotNull Map<String,Object> data)
      Creates a new punishment of the given type with the given data.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the type
      data - the data to create the punishment with
      Returns:
      the created punishment
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no punishment type is found for the given ID
      IllegalStateException - if no factory is registered for the found type
